Calculation Framework (Method + Impact Rules):
The health score uses a balanced baseline model with weighted findings and explicit impact display rules:
• Security (35%): Baseline 70 points, reduced by High and Medium impact findings (High weighted 2x, Medium 1x) using a gentle curve. Boosted by Defender coverage (30% weight).
• Reliability (25%): Baseline 70 points, reduced by High and Medium impact availability risks (High weighted 2x, Medium 1x). Boosted by backup coverage (30% weight).
• Governance (20%): Based on subscription ownership compliance and policy adherence (baseline 60 if metrics unavailable).
• Cost (10%): Baseline 60 points, increased by cost optimization opportunities identified. Higher findings indicate more savings potential.
• Operations (10%): Baseline 60 points, reduced by High and Medium impact operational findings (High weighted 1.5x, Medium 0.5x). Adjusted by stale resources.
• Impact display rules: Cost recommendations use a boosted multiplier (3x) with a minimum floor of +7; backup impact includes a +2.0 offset.
• Impact: All positive recommendations display at a minimum +1.0; governance and policy compliance are combined into one improvement line item for ranking.

Calculation Framework (Method + Impact Rules):
The health score uses a balanced baseline model with weighted findings and explicit impact display rules:
• Security (35%): Baseline 70 points, reduced by High and Medium impact findings (High weighted 2x, Medium 1x) using a gentle curve. Boosted by Defender coverage (30% weight).
• Reliability (25%): Baseline 70 points, reduced by High and Medium impact availability risks (High weighted 2x, Medium 1x). Boosted by backup coverage (30% weight).
• Governance (20%): Based on subscription ownership compliance and policy adherence (baseline 60 if metrics unavailable).
• Cost (10%): Baseline 60 points, increased by cost optimization opportunities identified. Higher findings indicate more savings potential.
• Operations (10%): Baseline 60 points, reduced by High and Medium impact operational findings (High weighted 1.5x, Medium 0.5x). Adjusted by stale resources.
• Impact display rules: Cost recommendations use a boosted multiplier (3x) with a minimum floor of +7; backup impact includes a +2.0 offset.
• Impact: All positive recommendations display at a minimum +1.0; governance and policy compliance are combined into one improvement line item for ranking.
